content.title: How it works: roles and spirit

columns.heading: VISEMI Core Team
columns.body: Designs and coordinates the program, tracks progress, and matches each Fellow with the right Ambassador.

columns.heading: Fellow
columns.body: The center of the program. Drives their own journey: attend workshops, submit on time, and prepare CV, SOP, and a target list.

columns.heading: Ambassador
columns.body: Shares real experience and gives feedback on CV, SOP, and cold emails, and on choosing schools, labs, and professors.

content.spirit: VISEMI coordinates · Fellow drives · Ambassador shares · Sponsor enables impact
